title: Smoky Chestnut Skillet
description: A keto-friendly skillet dish featuring smoky bacon, roasted chestnuts, and crispy onions.
instructions: Cook the smoky bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chestnuts to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 10-12 minutes.
While the chestnuts are roasting, chop the crispy onions.
Once the chestnuts are done, remove the skillet from the oven.
Add the chopped onions and cooked bacon back to the skillet.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
